data.content: Implemented on branch work/foolery-9c9a-impl3 (commit 99412107791d). Removed prompt-guidance references from README and audit docs, stopped shipping prompt template assets in runtime packaging, removed prompt-guidance setup/install flows from the generated CLI, deleted prompt CLI coverage, and aligned remaining help/doctor tests. Verified in /private/tmp/foolery-9c9a-r3 with bun run lint (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
